title: How can I see all tasks that I ASSIGNED for the week?
excerpt: How can I see all tasks that I ASSIGNED to team members for the week (NOT tasks that are assigned to me)? Or is this possible? I need to be able to look at all the tasks I assigned to my team in a central location, but c…

posts.author: Kmb1 (Kimberli)
posts.cookedHtml: How can I see all tasks that I ASSIGNED to team members for the week (NOT tasks that are assigned to me)? Or is this possible? I need to be able to look at all the tasks I assigned to my team in a central location, but cannot find how to do this.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Kmb1!

Through My Work you are able to filter to a specific team via the settings:

Screen Shot 2023-03-06 at 12.24.14 pm776×786 36.5 KB

Let me know if this helps!
